steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Start with $p = \sqrt{10c} - 16$. Add 16 to both sides: $p + 16 = \sqrt{10c}$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches the correct answer, $c=\frac{(p+16)^{2}}{10}$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore A is correct.
